profile_selection_receipt.basis: Residual work was split into isolated, coherent branch-no-pr change sets and landed only after validation and hosted no-PR preflight.

intent: Close out the remaining residue review recommendations through isolated branch-no-pr landings while preserving unrelated or ambiguous user-owned work.

included_change_sets.summary: Harden input surface contracts and validators.
Align proposal packet terminology and scaffold validation.
Align synthesize-research skill outputs with syntheses.
Add Rust tooling skill assets and required host projections.
Add the process-incoming-intake workflow, command, projections, and validation coverage.

excluded: The original dirty chore/inputs-clean-break worktree is preserved as user-owned or ambiguous residue.
Unrelated generated/effective outputs, exploratory report/package moves, release/version files, and state/control residue were not mixed into unrelated commits.
Raw .octon/inputs/** material was not treated as runtime, policy, generated, state/control, publication, retained evidence, or host-projection authority.

known_limitations: validate-skills.sh completed with exit 0 and two warnings unrelated to the Rust tooling skill assets change set.
No publishers, projection generators, migrations, or alignment profiles were run except capability routing and host projection publishers required by skill/command publication change sets.

durable_history.provider_preflight: Live provider rules allowed route-neutral hosted no-PR landing; empty check set was explicitly allowed; exact-SHA required checks passed for each hosted landing.

rollback_handles: Use git revert on origin/main for any landed commit that must be backed out.
Use the retained source branch refs until branch cleanup completes.
Use local worktrees under /private/tmp/octon-* as discardable isolated implementation workspaces until cleanup completes.

integration_status: All included change-set commits were landed on origin/main before this receipt was created.
publication_status: Capability routing and host projections were intentionally regenerated only for the Rust tooling skill assets and process-incoming-intake command/workflow change sets.

completed_before_receipt: Accepted change sets were split into isolated branches and landed on origin/main.
pending_after_receipt_landing: Fetch origin, sync local main to origin/main, verify commit containment, and remove only obsolete contained source branches/worktrees.
retained: Original dirty chore/inputs-clean-break worktree and branch remain untouched until explicitly resolved.
